summary: David, what a fantastic week—you've dropped 5 pounds over the past 14 days and you're now at 264.6 lbs, which means you've crushed 50.4 pounds total since starting. That's a solid 2.5 pounds per week, and your consistency with 13 logged days shows you're really committed to this journey. Your Dexcom and Garmin data are clearly helping you make smarter choices day to day. Next week, I'd love to see you dial in one specific meal or snack time where you feel the most challenged—that's where your CGM insights can shine brightest. You're doing the work that matters, and the scale is honest proof of that.
